originalAlarm.description: The value written to `&thisopt` is never used.

reasoning: When HAVE_TLSV1_X=F (as in the PC), SSL_PROTOCOL_TLSV1_1 is not defined (L3-5 block skipped). L13 uses SSL_PROTOCOL_TLSV1_1 as an identifier outside any #ifdef, so it is an undefined identifier → compile error. This configuration is non-compilable. The DEAD_STORE of thisopt would only exist when HAVE_TLSV1_X=T (where SSL_PROTOCOL_TLSV1_1 is defined and thisopt is assigned but never read). PC is incorrect. Classification: FALSE.
